title: Pagination
description: Accessible paginator with first/last jumps, configurable siblings and all the design system's visual tokens.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Paginator with first/last, prev/next and one sibling on each side by default.

siblings.title: More siblings
siblings.desc: Increase `sibling-count` to show more pages around the current one.

jump.title: Quick jump
jump.desc: Combine the paginator with a NumberInput to jump directly to a specific page.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes match the visual hierarchy of the surrounding context.

compact.title: Compact
compact.desc: Hides first/last buttons when space is tight or the context doesn't need them.

props.siblingCount: Sibling pages shown on each side of the current one.
props.boundaryCount: Pages pinned at the start and end of the range.
props.showFirstLast: Shows the first and last page buttons.
props.showPrevNext: Shows the previous and next page buttons.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the page changes. Used by v-model.
emits.change: Same payload as update:modelValue, useful for external listeners.
